content:
After a couple of years on Squarespace, I’ve moved this blog to Hugo hosted on GitHub Pages. Faster, cheaper (free), and I own the content in plain Markdown files rather than locked inside someone else’s platform.
The migration took an afternoon. Everything that was on the Squarespace blog is being moved over gradually.
A few things coming soon:
Notes from recent shoots Behind-the-scenes from client sessions The Dark Sky Guide — a comprehensive astrophotography location guide for the USA I’ve been building Stay tuned.
summary:
After a couple of years on Squarespace, I’ve moved this blog to Hugo hosted on GitHub Pages. Faster, cheaper (free), and I own the content in plain Markdown files rather than locked inside someone else’s platform.

The migration took an afternoon. Everything that was on the Squarespace blog is being moved over gradually.

A few things coming soon:

  • Notes from recent shoots
  • Behind-the-scenes from client sessions
  • The Dark Sky Guide — a comprehensive astrophotography location guide for the USA I’ve been building

Stay tuned.
title: Hello, new blog

content:
I’m a photographer based in the USA, passionate about landscape, astrophotography, and documentary work.
This blog is where I share thoughts on photography, travel notes, and the occasional technical deep-dive. My portfolio and client galleries live at somikphotography.com.
If you’re interested in astrophotography and dark sky locations across the USA, check out my Dark Sky Guide.
All images on this site are © Somik. Please don’t use them without permission.
title: About
